主要發現: 本週熱門研究主題: cardiovascular (17篇), mortality (15篇), biomarker (6篇)

高影響力期刊發表 11 篇，包括: Clinical transplantation, The Lancet. Infectious diseases, Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association
高品質證據: 17 篇 RCT, 3 篇統合分析

重點文章.標題: Plasma and urinary sTREM-1 as biomarkers of sepsis-associated acute kidney injury in critically Ill children.

PICO.O_結果: at the time of sepsis diagnosis according to pediatric Sequential Organ Failure Assessment (pSOFA) criteria

重點文章.中文摘要: 【結論】Both plasma and urinary sTREM-1 levels were significantly elevated in children who developed sepsis-associated acute kidney injury. Measurement at sepsis diagnosis may aid early risk stratification, while repeat assessment at AKI diagnosis may provide additional prognostic information.

結構化摘要.結論: Both plasma and urinary sTREM-1 levels were significantly elevated in children who developed sepsis-associated acute kidney injury. Measurement at sepsis diagnosis may aid early risk stratification, while repeat assessment at AKI diagnosis may provide additional prognostic information. WHAT IS KNOWN: • Early recognition of sepsis-associated acute kidney injury in children is challenging, and conventional diagnostic markers may be delayed. sTREM-1 is an inflammatory biomarker with potential value

MeSH詞彙: Triggering Receptor Expressed on Myeloid Cells-1

重點文章.標題: Fasting urine osmolality and risk of kidney disease progression in patients with type 2 diabetes.
重點文章.期刊: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

PICO.O_結果: a composite of end-stage kidney disease or doubling of serum creatinine concentration

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】AND HYPOTHESIS: Urinary concentrating capacity largely depends on the structural and functional integrity of distal tubule and peritubular compartment whilst fasting urine osmolality represents the closest estimation of the maximal urinary concentrating ability.

【研究方法】In this prospective study, fasting urine osmolality was measured in 1711 participants from the SMART2D (Singapore Study of Macro-angiopathy and Micro-Vascular Reactivity in Type 2 Diabetes) cohort in Singapore and 1097 participants from SURDIAGENE (SURvie, DIAbete de type 2 et GENEtique) cohort in F...

【主要結果】A total of 239 and 82 kidney events were identified during a mean (standard deviation) of 6.6 (1.6) and 7.4 (3.7) years of follow-up in the SMART2D and SURDIAGENE cohorts, respectively.

【結論】A low level of fasting urine osmolality is associated with increased risk of kidney disease progression independent of conventional risk factors. This readily accessible biomarker may potentially improve risk stratification for patients with type 2 diabetes.

結構化摘要.背景: AND HYPOTHESIS: Urinary concentrating capacity largely depends on the structural and functional integrity of distal tubule and peritubular compartment whilst fasting urine osmolality represents the closest estimation of the maximal urinary concentrating ability. We hypothesize that a low fasting urine osmolality is associated with high risk for kidney disease progression beyond estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) reduction and albuminuria in patients with type 2 diabetes.
結構化摘要.方法: In this prospective study, fasting urine osmolality was measured in 1711 participants from the SMART2D (Singapore Study of Macro-angiopathy and Micro-Vascular Reactivity in Type 2 Diabetes) cohort in Singapore and 1097 participants from SURDIAGENE (SURvie, DIAbete de type 2 et GENEtique) cohort in France. The primary outcome was a composite of end-stage kidney disease or doubling of serum creatinine concentration. The secondary outcome was rapid kidney function decline (RKFD) defined as eGFR dec
結構化摘要.結果: A total of 239 and 82 kidney events were identified during a mean (standard deviation) of 6.6 (1.6) and 7.4 (3.7) years of follow-up in the SMART2D and SURDIAGENE cohorts, respectively. Compared with the upper tertile, participants with fasting urine osmolality in the lowest tertile had an increased risk of the composite kidney events after adjustment for known clinical risk factors [adjusted harzard ratio 2.94 (1.12-7.69) and 1.74 (0.85-3.58)]. They also had higher odds of experiencing RKFD [ad
結構化摘要.結論: A low level of fasting urine osmolality is associated with increased risk of kidney disease progression independent of conventional risk factors. This readily accessible biomarker may potentially improve risk stratification for patients with type 2 diabetes.

重點文章.標題: Efficacy and safety of dapagliflozin in inactive lupus nephritis: a randomized crossover trial.
重點文章.期刊: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

PICO.I_介入: with stable renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system inhibitors and mycophenolate mofetil ≤2 g/day
PICO.O_結果: is a reduction of proteinuria compared with baseline (6 and 12 months)

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本隨機對照試驗旨在探討to analyse the effect and safety of dapagliflozin in inactive LN patients with residual proteinuria.

【研究方法】We recruited adult LN patients (class III, IV(±V)] without activity, with proteinuria >500 mg/24 h and an estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) ≥20 ml/min, on maintenance treatment with stable renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system inhibitors and mycophenolate mofetil ≤2 g/day.

【主要結果】From 97 screened patients, we excluded 67 due to active LN, low proteinuria or low eGFR. Thirty patients were randomized: 14 to start the treatment with dapagliflozin on top of SoC therapy and 16 to remain with the usual therapy for 6 months.

【結論】We demonstrate a significant reduction in residual proteinuria in patients with inactive LN with dapagliflozin without safety concerns.

結構化摘要.背景: Lupus nephritis (LN) patients under immunosuppression were excluded from the main trials with sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 inhibitors. This trial aims to analyse the effect and safety of dapagliflozin in inactive LN patients with residual proteinuria.
結構化摘要.方法: We recruited adult LN patients (class III, IV(±V)] without activity, with proteinuria >500 mg/24 h and an estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) ≥20 ml/min, on maintenance treatment with stable renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system inhibitors and mycophenolate mofetil ≤2 g/day. They were randomized to receive dapagliflozin on top of standard-of-care (SoC) therapy or not. After 6 months the groups were crossed over. The primary endpoint is a reduction of proteinuria compared with baseline (6
結構化摘要.結果: From 97 screened patients, we excluded 67 due to active LN, low proteinuria or low eGFR. Thirty patients were randomized: 14 to start the treatment with dapagliflozin on top of SoC therapy and 16 to remain with the usual therapy for 6 months. Nine patients were excluded from the analysis due to new LN flares or lost to follow-up. The mean age was 40.6 ± 12.3 years, 19 (90.5%) were female, none had diabetes and the mean body mass index was 26.1 ± 5.2. The final analysis showed a significant reduc
結構化摘要.結論: We demonstrate a significant reduction in residual proteinuria in patients with inactive LN with dapagliflozin without safety concerns.

重點文章.標題: Cardiorenal outcomes of weight loss interventions in people with CKD and type 2 diabetes.
重點文章.期刊: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

PICO.P_族群: type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) and chronic kidney disease (CKD)

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】AND HYPOTHESIS: In patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) and chronic kidney disease (CKD), there remains a paucity of data from large, high-quality, real-world studies on the efficacy of weight-lowering interventions, including the glucagon-like peptide-1-based therapies semaglutide and tirz...

【研究方法】Three cohorts with T2DM and CKD living with overweight or obesity, prescribed semaglutide or tirzepatide, or with a BS procedure were propensity-score matched with a cohort receiving dipeptidyl peptidase 4 inhibitors (DPP4i, weight-neutral control).

【主要結果】Cohorts included 17 749 (semaglutide, age 64.1 ± 10.9 years, 57.4% female), 4211 (tirzepatide, 63.7 ± 10.8, 58.1%) and 2603 (BS, 56.1 ± 11.2, 74.1%) patients. Compared with DPP4i, semaglutide reduced the risk of ESRD [HR 0.78 (95% confidence interval 0.71 to 0.

【結論】Using a real-world dataset, semaglutide, tirzepatide and BS-interventions shown to elicit weight loss and improve glycaemic control-have a myriad of benefits on cardio-renal outcomes and mortality, supporting their use as disease-modifying therapy options in T2DM and CKD.

結構化摘要.背景: AND HYPOTHESIS: In patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) and chronic kidney disease (CKD), there remains a paucity of data from large, high-quality, real-world studies on the efficacy of weight-lowering interventions, including the glucagon-like peptide-1-based therapies semaglutide and tirzepatide, as well as bariatric surgery (BS). This retrospective cohort study evaluates these interventions on cardiorenal outcomes and mortality using health records from TriNetX US Collaborative Netwo
結構化摘要.方法: Three cohorts with T2DM and CKD living with overweight or obesity, prescribed semaglutide or tirzepatide, or with a BS procedure were propensity-score matched with a cohort receiving dipeptidyl peptidase 4 inhibitors (DPP4i, weight-neutral control). We investigated the hazard ratio (HR) of: (i) end-stage renal disease (ESRD); (ii) myocardial infarction (MI); (iii) stroke; and (iv) all-cause mortality.
結構化摘要.結果: Cohorts included 17 749 (semaglutide, age 64.1 ± 10.9 years, 57.4% female), 4211 (tirzepatide, 63.7 ± 10.8, 58.1%) and 2603 (BS, 56.1 ± 11.2, 74.1%) patients. Compared with DPP4i, semaglutide reduced the risk of ESRD [HR 0.78 (95% confidence interval 0.71 to 0.85)], while tirzepatide showed a reduction of 42% (0.0.58, 0.45 to 0.75). BS lowered ESRD risk (0.79, 0.67 to 0.92). Semaglutide reduced MI (0.80, 0.72 to 0.88) and stroke (0.85, 0.77 to 0.95) risk, while tirzepatide lowered MI and stroke
結構化摘要.結論: Using a real-world dataset, semaglutide, tirzepatide and BS-interventions shown to elicit weight loss and improve glycaemic control-have a myriad of benefits on cardio-renal outcomes and mortality, supporting their use as disease-modifying therapy options in T2DM and CKD.

重點文章.標題: Tonsillectomy and immunosuppression improve outcomes in Caucasians with high-risk IgA nephropathy.
重點文章.期刊: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

PICO.P_族群: a definite clinical and histological diagnosis of primary IgAN (n = 221
PICO.O_結果: s: complete remission (CR), overall (complete or partial) remission (OR) and disease progression (>40% decrease in estimated glomerular filtration rate or end-stage kidney disease)

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】Considering the absence of such data, this study explored the effectiveness of immunosuppressive therapy (IST) and tonsillectomy (TE) in Caucasians with high-risk immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN).

【研究方法】The prospective non-randomised comparative study enrolled incident Caucasian patients with a definite clinical and histological diagnosis of primary IgAN (n = 221, age 35 ± 11 years, 52% male) at high risk of progression. All patients received IST (72.

【主要結果】The rates of early OR in the IST and TE + IST groups were 72.6% and 95.2%, respectively (P < .001). In the Kaplan-Meier analyses, the time to remission was 2-fold shorter in the TE + IST group (P < .001).

【結論】Tonsillectomy and immunosuppressive therapy may be effective for remission induction and delaying progression in high-risk IgAN patients.

結構化摘要.背景: Considering the absence of such data, this study explored the effectiveness of immunosuppressive therapy (IST) and tonsillectomy (TE) in Caucasians with high-risk immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN).
結構化摘要.方法: The prospective non-randomised comparative study enrolled incident Caucasian patients with a definite clinical and histological diagnosis of primary IgAN (n = 221, age 35 ± 11 years, 52% male) at high risk of progression. All patients received IST (72.3% glucocorticoid monotherapy) without TE (control group, n = 136) or with TE (TE + IST; experimental group, n = 85). The median follow-up period was 33 months (interquartile range 15-69). Kaplan-Meier and Cox regression analyses combined with pseu
結構化摘要.結果: The rates of early OR in the IST and TE + IST groups were 72.6% and 95.2%, respectively (P < .001). In the Kaplan-Meier analyses, the time to remission was 2-fold shorter in the TE + IST group (P < .001). In the adjusted Cox models, the probabilities of early OR and CR were significantly higher in the tonsillectomy group compared with IST alone {hazard ratio [HR] 3.364 [95% confidence interval (CI) 2.302-4.917] and HR 6.315 [95% CI 2.620-15.224], respectively}. The disease progression was regist
結構化摘要.結論: Tonsillectomy and immunosuppressive therapy may be effective for remission induction and delaying progression in high-risk IgAN patients.

重點文章.標題: The effect of icodextrin on peritoneal dialysis patients with congestive heart failure: a time-varying exposure design and target trial emulation approach.
重點文章.期刊: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

PICO.P_族群: congestive heart failure: a time-varying exposure design and target trial emulation approach
PICO.I_介入: the limited evidence regarding the use of icodextrin in patients with pre-existing congestive heart failure (CHF)
PICO.O_結果: s included all-cause mortality, cardiovascular mortality, sudden death and major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE)

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本世代研究旨在探討ed to examine the association between icodextrin use and clinical outcomes in PD patients.

【研究方法】We conducted a retrospective cohort study using the Chang Gung Research Database (CGRD), including 1800 eligible PD patients with CHF from 2005 to 2022 in Taiwan, followed through June 2023. Icodextrin users (≥50% of PD duration) were compared with non-users.

【主要結果】Icodextrin use was associated with lower risks of all-cause mortality [adjusted hazard ratio (HR) 0.16, 95% confidence interval (CI) 0.13-0.20], cardiovascular mortality (HR 0.20, 95% CI 0.13-0.30), sudden death (HR 0.15, 95% CI 0.11-0.19) and MACE (HR 0.68, 95% CI 0.58-0.80).

【結論】In PD patients with CHF, icodextrin use was independently associated with better survival and cardiovascular outcomes. These findings support its preferential use in high-risk PD populations and warrant further prospective investigation.

結構化摘要.背景: Icodextrin is an alternative peritoneal dialysis (PD) solution with favorable fluid management and metabolic properties. Given the limited evidence regarding the use of icodextrin in patients with pre-existing congestive heart failure (CHF), this study aimed to examine the association between icodextrin use and clinical outcomes in PD patients.
結構化摘要.方法: We conducted a retrospective cohort study using the Chang Gung Research Database (CGRD), including 1800 eligible PD patients with CHF from 2005 to 2022 in Taiwan, followed through June 2023. Icodextrin users (≥50% of PD duration) were compared with non-users. Primary outcomes included all-cause mortality, cardiovascular mortality, sudden death and major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE). Multivariable Cox proportional hazards models incorporating time-varying exposure to icodextrin were appli
結構化摘要.結果: Icodextrin use was associated with lower risks of all-cause mortality [adjusted hazard ratio (HR) 0.16, 95% confidence interval (CI) 0.13-0.20], cardiovascular mortality (HR 0.20, 95% CI 0.13-0.30), sudden death (HR 0.15, 95% CI 0.11-0.19) and MACE (HR 0.68, 95% CI 0.58-0.80). Icodextrin users also showed associations with reduced risks of encapsulating peritoneal sclerosis and transition to hemodialysis but lower transplantation rates.
結構化摘要.結論: In PD patients with CHF, icodextrin use was independently associated with better survival and cardiovascular outcomes. These findings support its preferential use in high-risk PD populations and warrant further prospective investigation.

重點文章.標題: The kidney failure risk equation in people with CKD and multimorbidity: the effect of competing mortality risks.
重點文章.期刊: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

PICO.C_對照: creatinine did not improve model performance

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】AND HYPOTHESIS: Guidelines recommend using risk prediction models for predicting kidney failure in chronic kidney disease (CKD). Many people with CKD have multiple long-term conditions (multimorbidity), which influences outcomes including kidney failure and mortality.

【研究方法】Observational cohort study using research-based (UK Biobank) and population-based cohorts (Stockholm Creatinine Measurements project: SCREAM). Multimorbidity was defined as two or more long-term conditions in addition to CKD.

【主要結果】14 998 of 24 489 individuals in UK Biobank (61.2%) and 30 147 of 42 902 individuals in SCREAM (70.3%) had multimorbidity. Discrimination of KFRE was good (area under curve $\ge $0.86 across eGFR equations in all cohorts, multimorbidity groups and time horizons).

【結論】Competing mortality risk is important when predicting kidney failure, particularly for people with multimorbidity. An updated model accounting for competing mortality risk, permits improved model performance.

結構化摘要.背景: AND HYPOTHESIS: Guidelines recommend using risk prediction models for predicting kidney failure in chronic kidney disease (CKD). Many people with CKD have multiple long-term conditions (multimorbidity), which influences outcomes including kidney failure and mortality. This study validated the four-variable kidney failure risk equation (KFRE) in individuals with CKD, with and without multimorbidity, comparing performance of KFRE using creatinine and cystatin C to calculate estimated glomerular fi
結構化摘要.方法: Observational cohort study using research-based (UK Biobank) and population-based cohorts (Stockholm Creatinine Measurements project: SCREAM). Multimorbidity was defined as two or more long-term conditions in addition to CKD. Kidney failure was defined as long-term dialysis or kidney transplantation. KFRE performance assessment included discrimination, calibration, and overall fit at 2 and 5 years. An updated model (using the same variables as KFRE) accounting for competing mortality risks was d
結構化摘要.結果: 14 998 of 24 489 individuals in UK Biobank (61.2%) and 30 147 of 42 902 individuals in SCREAM (70.3%) had multimorbidity. Discrimination of KFRE was good (area under curve $\ge $0.86 across eGFR equations in all cohorts, multimorbidity groups and time horizons). Kidney failure risk was under-estimated in people with multimorbidity in UK Biobank (observed/expected (O/E) ratio 1.75 at 5 years; eGFR creatinine). Conversely, calibration-in-the-large (O/E ratio) at 5 years in SCREAM was 1.05 in the m
結構化摘要.結論: Competing mortality risk is important when predicting kidney failure, particularly for people with multimorbidity. An updated model accounting for competing mortality risk, permits improved model performance.

重點文章.標題: Post-discharge sequelae of Lassa fever survivors in Nigeria: an analysis of the LASCOPE prospective cohort.

PICO.P_族群: PCR-confirmed Lassa fever hospitalised at Federal Medical Centre Owo
PICO.O_結果: clinical remission, defined as complete absence of symptoms

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本研究旨在探討ed to describe post-discharge sequelae in Lassa fever survivors and explore the effect of disease severity on sequelae patterns.

【研究方法】LASCOPE was a prospective study of patients with PCR-confirmed Lassa fever hospitalised at Federal Medical Centre Owo, Owo, Nigeria, between April 23, 2018, and Feb 17, 2023. All patients who provided informed consent were included, with no age restriction.

【主要結果】Of 882 survivors (median age 32 years [IQR 22-46], 459 [52%] female and 423 [48%] male), post-discharge data were available for 807 (91%), with a total of 2603 person-months of follow-up. For three of 807 survivors with post-discharge information, only the vital status was collected.

【結論】Patient-reported symptoms suggest good recovery with few hearing or neurosensory disorders in most survivors of Lassa fever. Future research would benefit from extended follow-up periods and standardised diagnostic assessments, including objective audiometry, to further characterise the full spectru...

結構化摘要.背景: Lassa fever is one of the most important viral haemorrhagic fevers, yet post-discharge sequelae remain inadequately characterised. Previous studies have been limited by small sample sizes and unsystematic assessments. We aimed to describe post-discharge sequelae in Lassa fever survivors and explore the effect of disease severity on sequelae patterns.
結構化摘要.目的: audiometry, to further characterise the full spectrum of post-Lassa fever complications. FUNDING: Institut National de la Santé et de la Recherche Médicale, University of Oxford, EU, UK Department for International Development, Wellcome Trust, French Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Agence Nationale de Recherches sur le SIDA et les Hépatites Virales, and French National Research Institute for Sustainable Development.
結構化摘要.方法: LASCOPE was a prospective study of patients with PCR-confirmed Lassa fever hospitalised at Federal Medical Centre Owo, Owo, Nigeria, between April 23, 2018, and Feb 17, 2023. All patients who provided informed consent were included, with no age restriction. Severe disease was defined as the presence of at least one of the following during the acute phase: National Early Warning Score version 2 score of 7 or higher, Kidney Disease Improving Global Outcomes stage 2 or higher, or Lassa virus PCR Ct

重點文章.標題: A comparison of the effects of tirzepatide and dulaglutide on major kidney events in people with type 2 diabetes: pre-specified exploratory analyses of the SURPASS-CVOT trial.

PICO.P_族群: 979 participants were screened and 13 299 (2948 with high-risk chronic kidney disease) were randomly assigned
PICO.I_介入: tirzepatide and 6579 were assigned to dulaglutide

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本隨機對照試驗旨在探討ed to assess major kidney events in the overall population, low-to-moderate-risk chronic kidney disease population, and high-risk chronic kidney disease population.

【研究方法】SURPASS-CVOT was a randomised, active comparator-controlled, double-blind trial that enrolled people with type 2 diabetes and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease at 640 sites in 30 countries.

【主要結果】of a pre-specified exploratory analysis of SURPASS-CVOT that aimed to assess major kidney events in the overall population, low-to-moderate-risk chronic kidney disease population, and high-risk chronic kidney disease population.

【結論】Among people with type 2 diabetes and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, tirzepatide was associated with a reduced risk of major kidney events compared with dulaglutide, primarily driven by a reduction in new-onset macroalbuminuria in people with low-to-moderate-risk chronic kidney disease, and...

結構化摘要.背景: In the SURPASS-CVOT trial, tirzepatide, a dual incretin agonist that targets the glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide and glucagon-like peptide-1 receptors, was shown to be non-inferior to dulaglutide for the primary composite cardiovascular outcome in people with type 2 diabetes and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease. Here, we report the results of a pre-specified exploratory analysis of SURPASS-CVOT that aimed to assess major kidney events in the overall population, low-to-moderate
結構化摘要.方法: SURPASS-CVOT was a randomised, active comparator-controlled, double-blind trial that enrolled people with type 2 diabetes and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease at 640 sites in 30 countries. Participants aged 40 years or older with type 2 diabetes and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, HbA1c between 7% and 10·5%, and a BMI of 25 kg/m2 or greater were randomly assigned 1:1 to once-weekly blinded subcutaneous injection of either tirzepatide up to 15 mg or dulaglutide 1·5 mg. Annual visits
結構化摘要.結果: of a pre-specified exploratory analysis of SURPASS-CVOT that aimed to assess major kidney events in the overall population, low-to-moderate-risk chronic kidney disease population, and high-risk chronic kidney disease population. 重點文章.標題: Randomized Controlled Trial of a Digital Intervention (KidneyTIME) to Promote Live Donor Kidney Transplantation.

PICO.P_族群: viewed at least one optional video had significantly higher cumulative donor inquiry probability than those who did not (viewer 22
PICO.I_介入: animated video LDKT education and outreach enablement via video sharing
PICO.O_結果: ≥1 live donor inquiry within 12 months in the intent-to-treat population

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】Digital behavioral interventions are promising to support patients' pursuit of live donor kidney transplantation (LDKT). This study examined the effectiveness of a patient-led digital intervention (KidneyTIME) versus active control on facilitating LDKT.

【研究方法】An individually randomized (1:1) parallel-group trial was conducted at a safety-net hospital transplant program with adult kidney transplant candidates in referral, evaluation, or listed phases who were English-speaking and had email or text access.

【主要結果】Between 4/22 and 7/23, 422 candidates (mean age 54 years; 57% male, 45% income < $30,000) were randomized to KidneyTIME (n = 212) or active control (n = 210). Between-group differences in donor outreach behaviors and receipt of a donor inquiry were not detected.

【結論】A digital intervention self-administered by patients did not increase donor inquiries. Preliminary dose effect findings suggest the need to consider how to encourage people to engage more with the intervention.

結構化摘要.背景: Digital behavioral interventions are promising to support patients' pursuit of live donor kidney transplantation (LDKT). This study examined the effectiveness of a patient-led digital intervention (KidneyTIME) versus active control on facilitating LDKT.
結構化摘要.方法: An individually randomized (1:1) parallel-group trial was conducted at a safety-net hospital transplant program with adult kidney transplant candidates in referral, evaluation, or listed phases who were English-speaking and had email or text access. KidneyTIME participants received animated video LDKT education and outreach enablement via video sharing. The primary outcome was ≥1 live donor inquiry within 12 months in the intent-to-treat population. Secondary outcomes included LDKT knowledge, at
結構化摘要.結果: Between 4/22 and 7/23, 422 candidates (mean age 54 years; 57% male, 45% income < $30,000) were randomized to KidneyTIME (n = 212) or active control (n = 210). Between-group differences in donor outreach behaviors and receipt of a donor inquiry were not detected. KidneyTIME participants had higher LDKT knowledge (p = 0.002), new listing behaviors (IRR:1.62, p = 0.005), and extent of video sharing (p = 0.016). In planned as-treated analysis, intervention participants who viewed at least one option
結構化摘要.結論: A digital intervention self-administered by patients did not increase donor inquiries. Preliminary dose effect findings suggest the need to consider how to encourage people to engage more with the intervention.

研究想法.想法:
目前 'cardiovascular' 是研究熱點 (17 篇相關文章)，可考慮：
1. 在本地族群中驗證相關發現
2. 結合其他熱門主題進行交叉研究
3. 針對特定亞群進行深入分析
研究想法.建議研究類型: 觀察性研究 / 回顧性分析

研究想法.關鍵詞: 兒童腎臟學 + 成人腎臟學
研究想法.想法:
考慮進行兒童至成人的長期追蹤研究：
1. 兒童期腎臟疾病對成年後的影響
2. 早期介入對長期預後的效果
3. 生命歷程觀點的腎臟病研究

應用人工智慧於腎臟病研究：
1. 建立腎功能預測模型
2. 影像自動判讀系統
3. 治療反應預測
研究想法.建議研究類型: 回顧性資料分析 + 模型開發

研究想法.想法:
利用真實世界數據進行研究：
1. 健保資料庫分析
2. 電子病歷數據挖掘
3. 多中心登錄資料分析

本週有 11 篇高影響力期刊文章，可考慮：
1. 在本地族群中驗證這些發現
2. 探索可能的機轉
3. 研究是否有族群差異
